headline: Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) Reports Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Energy infrastructure company Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 13.8% year on year to $4.83 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.48 per share was 22.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
